data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: WhatsApp's backend is built using a microservices architecture that allows for scalability and resilience.
data.technical_spec: Services run independently and communicate over APIs and messaging queues.

data.title: Real-Time Messaging Protocols
data.description: The platform uses custom protocols optimized for real-time messaging over low-bandwidth networks.
data.technical_spec: Employs techniques like binary protocol schemes and mobile-optimized heartbeat mechanisms.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: WhatsApp utilizes end-to-end encryption to ensure message privacy and security.
data.technical_spec: Implements the Signal Protocol for encryption of message content.

data.title: Global Server Network
data.description: A distributed server network enhances global availability and speed.
data.technical_spec: Data centers distributed across multiple continents; uses CDNs.

data.title: High Availability Databases
data.description: Databases are designed for high availability and redundancy.
data.technical_spec: Uses systems like MySQL and NoSQL databases with replication strategies.
